_meta.name: Apple Docs
_meta.description: Search and read Apple's official developer documentation from the live DocC data layer — 4 tools, no auth
_meta.notes: Requires npm build before first use. No API key. Fetches docs on demand and caches JSON under $XDG_CACHE_HOME/apple-docs-mcp.

_meta.name: App Store Connect
_meta.description: Full App Store Connect API — CI/CD, TestFlight, submissions, IAP, and more (80+ tools)
_meta.notes: Requires npm build before first use. Auth via App Store Connect API key (.p8 file).

_meta.name: Skill Search
_meta.description: Semantic/keyword search over the 57 apple-dev skills and their reference docs. Use to find the right skill or guidance without loading full SKILL.md files into context. 3 tools: search_skills (BM25 keyword search returning top chunks), list_skills (all skill names + descriptions), get_skill_section (full text of a skill or specific heading).
_meta.notes: Zero-auth, zero-infra. Indexes src/skills/**/*.md at startup (lazy, in-memory). Override the skills root with SKILL_SEARCH_ROOT env var. No API key required. Use search_skills to discover which skill covers a topic; use get_skill_section to read the full guidance once identified.
_meta.instructions: Call search_skills(query) first whenever you need to find guidance on an Apple development topic. It returns ranked chunks with {skill, file, heading, snippet, score} so you can identify the right skill without reading entire files. Then call get_skill_section(skill, heading?) to load only the section you need.
